news.t: Defiance Launches XOVL: The First Leveraged ETF with SpaceX Exposure
Defiance Launches XOVL (2X XOVR ETF): The First Leveraged ETF with SpaceX Exposure

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long XOVR ETF (XOVL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF (NASDAQ: XOVR), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. XOVL was launched on May 4, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
